evidence.purpose: RCA, concurrency measurement, mitigation decision, and propagation proof
Worker-facing Beads workflow rule for serial write lane
Fleet install propagation path for L137

commands.summary: 0 committed writes in each 60-second trauma window
anchors present in skill, AGENTS.md, canonical AGENTS, and flywheel-install template

joshua_lens_depth_check.operator_grade_durability: The serial lane removes recurring lock contention from the daily operator path instead of letting every worker diagnose the same contention class.
joshua_lens_depth_check.team_fit: A junior worker can queue a Beads mutation and keep moving; they do not need to understand SQLite WAL, MCP reservations, and JSONL export semantics to stay productive.
joshua_lens_depth_check.company_building_leverage: The doctrine lands in the install template, so the rule compounds across fleet repos instead of being a one-repo note.
joshua_lens_depth_check.turnover_resilience: The queue reason, L-rule, and skill guidance are durable surfaces that survive the original worker leaving the pane.
